key_insight: MobileNetV3 can classify pipeline weld defects from noisy RGB images with very high accuracy while remaining lightweight enough for on-device inspection.
engineering_relevance: This supports faster, lower-power, and more scalable weld quality inspection for pipelines, especially in field conditions where manual review is slow and inconsistent.
method: Preprocess weld images and apply data augmentation to improve robustness.
Train and compare MobileNetV3 Small and Large for multi-class defect classification.
Evaluate performance on two real-world datasets collected with HDR cameras and mobile phones.
evidence_signal: The model achieved 99.99% accuracy on the 4,927-image AI5083 dataset and improved results on the smaller PWDID dataset, with about a 3% gain over prior methods.
watch_item: The very small PWDID dataset and noisy acquisition conditions may limit generalization, so deployment should be validated on more diverse field data.
paper_title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images
